title: Tooltip
description: A tooltip shows supplemental information on hover or focus of a trigger element. CSS-only — no JS required.
whenToUse: For icon-only button labels. For abbreviations or terms requiring explanation. For short hints on sparse UIs.
whenNotToUse: For critical information the user must see — use inline text or a notification. For interactive content — tooltips should not contain buttons or links.
acceptanceCriteria: Public API uses <udc-tooltip> Web Component tag.

keyboard.action: Focus the wrapped element — tooltip appears on focus
Not supported in this CSS-only version

_legacyAccessibilityNotes: Use role="tooltip" on the tooltip element. The trigger should have aria-describedby pointing to the tooltip id for screen reader support.
